meaning: adj.口头的,口语的 vbl.speak的过去分词
examples: He was a gentle, soft-spoken, intelligent man.
Sherry is black, tall, slender and soft-spoken.
The spoken word is immediate but lacks permanence.
Meanwhile Shane Watson has spoken of his determination to help the Brisbane flood victims.
I've spoken with my play sister more in the last week than I have in a year.
